criteria.name: Hourly CSVs exist

criteria.name: Hourly FWI columns
criteria.evidence: ffmc,dmc,dc,isi,bui,fwi present in all hourly CSVs

criteria.name: Daily FWI columns
criteria.evidence: ffmc,dmc,dc,isi,bui,fwi present in all daily CSVs

criteria.name: Imputation after concat+dedup
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py line 366: impute runs on combined_hourly after drop_duplicates at line 362

summary: Phase 3 pipeline integration complete. All 9 acceptance criteria pass. Pipeline flows correctly: discover → adapt → concat → dedup → impute → FWI → write. All 6 stations produce hourly/daily CSVs with FWI columns. Architecture checks pass: all adapters inherit BaseAdapter, router uses ADAPTER_REGISTRY.
